name: currency-converter
description: Convert between currencies — `100 USD to EUR`, `5 GBP JPY`, or `200 SEK` against your home currency. Uses open.er-api.com (no API key required).

options.label: Home currency (3-letter ISO 4217 code, used as the implicit target)
Decimal places in the formatted output
Cache TTL in seconds (0 = trust the API's next-update timestamp, typically 24h)
